# WeekFit

> WeekFit is an AI fitness coach for iPhone. It reads sleep, recovery, activity and nutrition from Apple Health and tells you what matters today. Private by design, no account required.

## Entity

- Product: WeekFit
- Developer: WeekFit
- Platform: iPhone (iOS)
- Category: AI fitness coach
- Data source: Apple Health
- Price: Free
- Status: Public TestFlight beta

## Capabilities

- Recovery score from sleep, HRV and resting heart rate
- Activity and workouts synced from Apple Health
- Nutrition and macro tracking in daily context
- AI Coach: daily guidance from combined health signals
- Weekly workout planning

## Install

- TestFlight: https://testflight.apple.com/join/t5TKwEff

## Contact

- support@weekfit.app

## Index

- Sitemap: https://weekfit.app/sitemap.xml

## Note

WeekFit provides fitness and wellness guidance, not medical advice.
